---
title: 'Four Blood Moons and Rising Anti Semitism... The Wind Is Blowing Again!'
date: '2015-07-03T03:30:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Discerning The Time'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2328939094902049565'
blogger_filename: '/2015/07/four-blood-moons-and-rising-anti.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Discerning The Time/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<h4>
The Count Down Of History</h4>
Approximately <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anno_Domini" target="_blank">1 AD</a> to 33 AD Jesus (A Jew) lived, died, rose again. The Holy Spirit Came. The Church was Born. Many believe he his crucifixion took place around <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jesus" target="_blank">33 AD</a>. And thus out modern era was born. Which is why many scholars now use the term C.E.(Common Era) instead of A.D. (<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anno_Domini" target="_blank">Anno Domini</a>)<br />
<br />
During Jesus ministry he prophesied some things that have directly affected the nation of Israel to this day.<br />
<br />
We won't take the entire chapter apart here in this article. But let's take a look at some important parts.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/matthew/24.html" target="_blank">Matthew 24</a><br />
1 Then Jesus went out and departed from the temple, and His disciples came up to show Him the buildings of the temple. 2 And Jesus said to them, "Do you not see all these things? Assuredly,<b> I say to you, not one stone shall be left here upon another, that shall not be thrown down."</b> 3 Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying, "Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?"<br />
<br />
4 And Jesus answered and said to them: "Take heed that no one deceives you. 5 For many will come in My name, saying, 'I am the Christ,' and will deceive many. 6 And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not troubled; for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet. <b>7 For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. </b>And there will be famines, pestilences, and earthquakes in various places.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
8 All these are the beginning of sorrows. <b>9 Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and kill you, and you will be hated by all nations for My name's sake. </b>10 And then many will be offended, will betray one another, and will hate one another. 11 Then many false prophets will rise up and deceive many. 12 And because lawlessness will abound, the love of many will grow cold. 13 But he who endures to the end shall be saved.&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b>14 And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.</b></blockquote>
<br />
<b>So Jesus tells us that:</b><br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>The Temple will be destroyed.&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>Nations will rise in war against other nations (World Wars)</b></li>
<li><b>Kingdoms will rise against Kingdoms. (Spiritual Wars) (Kingdom of Darkness against the Kingdom of God's Dear Son. <a href="http://biblehub.com/colossians/1-13.htm" target="_blank">Col 1:13</a>)</b></li>
<li><b>God's People will be hated, killed, and given up to trials and tribulations all for the name of God. (Both Christians and Jews bear the title Children of God) (Inquisitions, Holocaust(s), and more have been levied against all true followers of God by Religions and Governments seeking control and power).&nbsp;</b></li>
<li><b>The Gospel Will Be Preached, IN ALL THE WORLD, as a witness to ALL the nations, and THEN the end will come.&nbsp;</b></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
A Brief Recap Of The History of Israel Since Jesus (1 AD)</h4>
<br />
Only 37 years after Jesus left the Church to grow, the Romans began their assault:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; margin-bottom: 0.5em; margin-top: 0.5em;">
<i>The&nbsp;<b><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Siege_of_Jerusalem_(70)" target="_blank">Siege of Jerusalem</a></b>&nbsp;in the year 70&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anno_Domini" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Anno Domini">AD</a>&nbsp;was the decisive event of the&nbsp;<a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/First_Jewish-Roman_War" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="First Jewish-Roman War">First Jewish-Roman War</a>. The&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roman_Empire" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Roman Empire">Roman</a>army, led by the future Emperor&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Titus" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Titus">Titus</a>, with&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tiberius_Julius_Alexander" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Tiberius Julius Alexander">Tiberius Julius Alexander</a>&nbsp;as his second-in-command, besieged and conquered the city of&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerusalem" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Jerusalem">Jerusalem</a>, which had been occupied by its&nbsp;<a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jew" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Jew">Jewish</a>&nbsp;defenders in 66&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anno_Domini" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Anno Domini">AD</a>.<br />The siege ended with the sacking of the city and the destruction of its famous&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Second_Temple" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Second Temple">Second Temple</a>. The destruction of both the first and second temples is still mourned annually as the Jewish fast&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tisha_B%27Av" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Tisha B'Av">Tisha B'Av</a>. The&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arch_of_Titus" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Arch of Titus">Arch of Titus</a>, celebrating the Roman sack of Jerusalem and the Temple, still stands in&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rome" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none;" title="Rome">Rome</a>.</i></blockquote>
<br />
By <a href="http://history-of-israel.org/history/chronological_presentation11.php" target="_blank">AD 135</a> the Romans officially renamed "Judea" as "Palestine", believing the area to have been a word derived from "Philistine", the enemy God, through Israel, Conquered, to take over the land of Canaan. Although Jews still lived in the area, it no longer bear their name, the name of God's people.<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://history-of-israel.org/history/chronological_presentation12.php" target="_blank">By 313</a> Constantine had turned the official religion of The Roman Empire, to Christianity, or at least his twisted version of it. Holy Sites were being built in Israel and Jews were once again evicted by religious government.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<i><br /></i>
<br />
Inquisition Info by&nbsp;<a href="https://www.jewishvirtuallibrary.org/jsource/History/Inquisition.html" target="_blank">Jewish Virtual Library</a><br />
<br />
In 1288 the first mass burning of Jews at the stake took place in the France due to a move by organized religion to seek out and destroy those who would teach or preach any doctrine but the officially approved religious doctrine they had authorized. All brands of religious doctrine and expression, including Jewish teaching. By 1481 the Inquisition started in Spain.<br />
<br />
<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_I" target="_blank">Wiki on WW1</a><br />
<br />
<b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">World War I</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;(</span><b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">WWI</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;or&nbsp;</span><b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">WW1</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">), also known as the&nbsp;</span><b style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">First World War</b><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">, was a&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_war" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="World war">global war</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;centred in&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Europe" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Europe">Europe</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;that began on 28 July 1914 and lasted until 11 November 1918.&nbsp;</span><br />
<br />
<br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">Lobbying by&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chaim_Weizmann" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;" title="Chaim Weizmann">Chaim Weizmann</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;and fear that American Jews would encourage the USA to support Germany culminated in the British government's&nbsp;</span><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Balfour_Declaration" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Balfour Declaration">Balfour Declaration</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;of 1917, endorsing creation of a&nbsp;</span><a class="mw-redirect" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jewish_homeland" style="background-color: white; background-image: none; color: #0b0080; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px; text-decoration: none;" title="Jewish homeland">Jewish homeland</a><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;in Palestine.</span><sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-202" style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_I#cite_note-202" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[202]</a></sup><span style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22.399999618530273px;">&nbsp;A total of more than 1,172,000 Jewish soldiers served in the Allied and Central Power forces in World War I, including 275,000 in Austria-Hungary and 450,000 in Czarist Russia.</span><sup class="reference" id="cite_ref-203" style="background-color: white; color: #252525; font-family: sans-serif; line-height: 1; unicode-bidi: -webkit-isolate;"><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/World_War_I#cite_note-203" style="background-image: none; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; color: #0b0080; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;">[203]</a></sup><br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.jafi.org/JewishAgency/English/jewish%20education/Compelling%20Content/Jewish%20History/Zionist%20Institutions/JAFI%20Timeline/1917-1919.htm" target="_blank">TimeLine by Jafi</a><br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>In February, Mark Sykes (1879-1919), adviser on Middle Eastern affairs to Britain's Prime Minister Lloyd George opens negotiations with the Zionist leaders that are to lead to the Balfour Declaration. The British want to protect their interests in the Suez Canal area by placing the whole Palestine under their control.
</i></blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
New Threats Loom</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
The Following is an excerpt from an article by <a href="http://www.ynetnews.com/articles/0,7340,L-4510688,00.html" target="_blank">YNetNews.Com</a>:<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>The leaflet was written in Russian and had Russia's national symbol on it, as well as the <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Donetsk" target="_blank">Donetsk </a>People's Republic insignia.
 
"Dear Ukraine citizens of Jewish nationality," the flyer began, "due to the fact that the leaders of the Jewish community of Ukraine

supported Bendery Junta," a reference to Stepan Bandera, the leader of the Ukrainian nationalist movement which fought for Ukrainian independence at the end of World War II, "and oppose the pro-Slavic People's Republic of Donetsk, (the interim government) has decided that all citizens of Jewish descent, over 16 years of age and residing within the republic's territory are required to report to the Commissioner for Nationalities in the Donetsk Regional Administration building and register."
 
The leaflet detailed what type of documents the Jewish citizens would need to supply: "ID and passport are required to register your Jewish religion, religious documents of family members, as well as documents establishing the rights to all real estate property that belongs to you, including vehicles."
 
If the message was not made clear enough, the leaflet further stipulated the consequences that would come to those who failed to abide by the new demands: "Evasion of registration will result in citizenship revoke and you will be forced outside the country with a confiscation of property."
 
To add insult to injury, the leaflet demanded the Jews pay a registration fee of $50.
</i></blockquote>
This turned out to be only<a href="http://www.snopes.com/politics/religion/ukraine.asp" target="_blank"> half true</a>&nbsp;as Snopes explains:<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', arial; font-size: 12px;">Exactly who distributed the leaflets, and why, is still unclear. The material purportedly bore the signature of Denis Pushilin, supposedly the self-proclaimed leader of the pro-Russian separatist group, but he has&nbsp;</span><a href="http://evreiskiy.kiev.ua/v-donecke-razdali-nacistskuju-13077.html" style="color: rgb(0, 51, 153) !important; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', arial; font-size: 12px;" target="main">maintained</a><span style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', arial; font-size: 12px;">&nbsp;that his group had nothing to do with the leaflets and that they were put out by someone else to discredit the separatists as being anti-Semitic...</span><span style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', arial; font-size: 12px;">Read more at&nbsp;<a href="http://www.snopes.com/politics/religion/ukraine.asp#lCjU7SPUywMfGUCb.99" style="color: #003399;">http://www.snopes.com/politics/religion/ukraine.asp#lCjU7SPUywMfGUCb.99</a></span></i></blockquote>
<br />
Also this week, a man shouting Anti Jewish slurs shot people at a Jewish Community Center on the eve of Passover.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i><b style="background-color: white; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><a href="http://www.cnn.com/2014/04/14/us/kansas-jewish-center-shooting/" target="_blank">(CNN)</a></b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px;"><a href="http://www.cnn.com/2014/04/14/us/kansas-jewish-center-shooting/" target="_blank">&nbsp;-</a>- A man with a history of spouting anti-Semitic rhetoric is suspected of shooting to death&nbsp;</span><a href="http://www.cnn.com/2014/04/14/us/kansas-shootings-victims/index.html" style="background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #004276; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px; margin: 0px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline;" target="_blank">a boy and his grandfather</a><span style="background-color: white; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px;">&nbsp;outside a Jewish community center near Kansas City, Kansas, and then a woman at a nearby Jewish assisted living facility.</span></i></blockquote>
<br />
People are making movies and sitcoms about prophecy, trying to figure out what Jesus meant. But without the Holy Spirit they come up with wildly imaginative, but completely inaccurate ideas. Like the sitcom Zero Hour, which was entertaining, but not even close to biblically/prophetically accurate<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Article By John Hagee on the Four Blood Moons on the <a href="http://www.christianpost.com/news/is-everything-about-to-change-the-first-of-four-blood-moons-occurs-april-15-117957/" target="_blank">Christian Post:</a><br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i>1. Passover-April 15, 2014<br />2. Feast of Tabernacles-October 8, 2014<br />3. Passover-April 4, 2015<br />4. Feast of Tabernacles-September 28, 2015</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i>Four Blood Moons (Tetrads) that are significant to Israel and also occur during Jewish Feasts are extremely rare-they have happened only three times in more than five hundred years.</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i>To understand the significance of this coming series of Four Blood Moons, we need to consider the globally significant religious events connected with the previous three Tetrads.</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i><b><span style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">The Four Blood Moons of 1493–94</span>&nbsp;</b>announced the <b>Edict of Expulsion,</b> which banished from Spain all Jewish people who, despite being tortured, refused to convert to Catholicism during the Spanish Inquisition. But their tears ended in triumph when Christopher Columbus found a haven for Jews around the world: America.</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i><span style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;"><b>The Four Blood Moons of 1949–50</b></span>&nbsp;followed the <b>birth of the State of Israel</b>, in which God gathered the Jewish exiles from the nations of the world and brought them home to the land of covenant as foretold by the Old Testament prophets.</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<i><span style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;"><b>The Four Blood Moons of 1967–68</b></span>&nbsp;coincided with the <b>Six-Day Wa</b>r, when the city of <b>Jerusalem was finally reunited with the State of Israel. </b>Today, Jerusalem is more than the country's "undivided capital"-it's where Christ was crucified for the sins of the world and where He will return to rule a global kingdom that will never end.</i><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;</span></blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-transition: all 0.3s ease 0s; background-color: white; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88em; line-height: 22.527999877929688px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px; transition: all 0.3s ease 0s;">
<a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1617952141/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=1617952141&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20" rel="nofollow" style="background-color: transparent;" target="_blank">Four Blood Moons: Something Is About to Change By John Hagee</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=1617952141" height="1" style="background-color: transparent; border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" /><span style="background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;(Affiliate Link)</span></blockquote>
<div>
<br /></div>
Hmmmm<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
To read it yourself:</h4>
<br />
<a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/1617952141/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=1617952141&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Four Blood Moons: Something Is About to Change By John Hagee</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=1617952141" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" />&nbsp;(Affiliate Link)<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thanks for studying with me.<br />
<br />
By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">DiscerningTheTime</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://discerningthetime.blogspot.com</a><br />
<br />
